untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-asset class surveillance (equities, commodities, emerging markets, currencies simultaneously at all-time highs) and media narrative scoring, which cannot be expressed with single-symbol technical indicators. Requires external data feeds and NLP sentiment analysis beyond allowed indicator set. Only VIX/complacency component is translatable to india_vix < 25th percentile.
translation_notes: PARTIAL TRANSLATION: Mapped observable volatility complacency condition (VIX in bottom quartile ≈ india_vix < 25) and exit on breakout to new highs (close crosses above Donchian upper). The core regime-shift detection requires cross-asset monitoring and narrative intensity scoring which cannot be mechanically expressed using single-instrument technical indicators. This signal is fundamentally a macro regime detector requiring human judgment or external data integrations (multi-asset ATH scanner, sentiment API, media monitoring system).
